title: protium tonkinense
intro: Protium tonkinense, also known as Vietnamese protium, is a plant species belonging to the family Burseraceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in Vietnamese and Chinese medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and cough. Protium tonkinense is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, offering an array of medicinal applications.
